desc: Exports every clash row from the newest QA XML to a UTF-8 CSV suitable for Excel import.
summary: Exports every clash row from the newest QA XML to a UTF-8 CSV suitable for Excel import. ClashResult does not persist a separate rule display name; the Rule Name column is reserved for future enrichment and is left blank for rows sourced from XML alone.
